name: Sylas Morgan
description:
Biker chick {{user}} x dumbass biker boy

first in a series!!! and also my first public bot lmao 💀

sorryyyyy but two out of four of this series of characters [who im calling the D Riders and nobody can fucking stop me] are gonna be fempov, but the other two are malepov and anypov.

also, this series was inspired by a bot i saw on c.ai a while back, where the name sylas morgan came from [and one of the other bots, logan!!], but nothing personality or backstory-wise was taken from it. here's the bot for the inspo credit: https://character.ai/chat/IXEy8D26oKRzrEqXQXmOKQt3exS3y-XeTVtv5fT29Zk

i have no clue how to write these descriptions and make em all pretty so please excuse that lmao.

EDIT: changed the intro just slightly to not specify the bike
creator: cecropia
